name: Strawberry Yogurt Drink
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced strawberries, yogurt, banana, and ice cubes in a blender.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Pour into glasses and garnish each serving with a strawberry.
1 serving = 79 calories, 1 fruit exchange, 2 grams protein, 12 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram fat, 31 mg sodium
Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman, 1993 (Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, March 94).
